transcript.title: Opening
transcript.text: Good morning Rushil Bhatia. Here is your daily news for Saturday, July 4. In today's briefing: top headlines, bhopal and madhya pradesh, business and markets, money, tax and personal finance, science and technology, development and policy, across india, around the world. Let's begin.

transcript.title: Top headlines
transcript.text: First, the stories leading the news this morning. UK Hindus lose land bid to church and Muslim group. British Hindus in Cambridgeshire have been denied their first place of worship in Northstowe, with a local council awarding faith land to a church and Muslim group. Hindu Samaj Northstowe's bid, proposing an interfaith centre and temple, was scored lower than the Northstowe Church Network's proposal. This leaves around 150 Hindu families without a local space for worship and cultural practices, forcing them to travel long distances. BLA claims over 30 Pakistani security personnel killed in 'fidayee' attack in Gwadar. A suicide commando attack by the banned Baloch Liberation Army (BLA) has targeted a Pakistan Coast Guard camp in Jiwani, Gwadar. The BLA claims over 30 security personnel were killed and the camp was reduced to rubble by an explosive-laden truck and subsequent ground assault. The group vows to continue its fight for Balochistan's independence. Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce tie knot in star-studded Madison Square Garden wedding. Pop superstar Taylor Swift and NFL star Travis Kelce have tied the knot in a star-studded ceremony at New York's Madison Square Garden. Family members played key roles, with Adam Sandler officiating. The surprise wedding, following a highly publicized romance, saw around 1,000 guests in attendance. The couple recently made a significant charitable donation. 'Going to have ups and downs': England star issues reality check for Sooryavanshi. The cricket world has been waiting for Sooryavanshi's India debut ever since he was picked for the tour of the UK following his performances for Rajasthan Royals in IPL 2026. 3 Delhi projects you paid for, but can't use: Admin delays deny public use of key facilities. Several completed public facilities in Delhi, including Karol Bagh's Heritage Park and a Jangpura pet park, remain inaccessible to citizens years after construction. Bureaucratic inertia and procedural delays, even for projects with no financial constraints like the JPN Library, are preventing these valuable assets from serving the public, leading to significant underutilization of investment. After years of tracking packages, Amazon planning to use the same playbook for employees. Amazon is reportedly deploying wearable devices to precisely track warehouse employees in support roles, previously monitored manually. This new 'Right Station Link' program aims to automate data collection, eliminate human error, and optimize worker placement, potentially saving billions. The move follows Amazon's success in tracking frontline workers and addresses concerns about overstaffing in mobile positions. Indus water pact to stay suspended, asserts India. India has firmly stated that the Indus Waters Treaty remains suspended until Pakistan unequivocally ends its backing of cross-border terrorism. The Ministry of External Affairs reiterated this stance, emphasizing that the treaty's abeyance is a direct response to Pakistan's continued sponsorship of such activities. This position follows a previous declaration that 'blood and water can't flow together' after a significant attack. Spouse accused of adultery can't invoke right to privacy, says SC. The Supreme Court has ruled that the right to privacy under Article 21 cannot shield a man from disclosing mobile call records and hotel stay details to prove adultery. Upholding the Delhi High Court's decision, the apex court stated that privacy is not absolute and can be restricted in public interest, especially when adultery is a ground for divorce under the Hindu Marriage Act. WMO warns of rapid El Nino development during July-September. El Nino's rapid development is set to intensify global extreme weather, including heatwaves and droughts, impacting the Indian subcontinent. India already faces a significant rainfall deficit, with June recording a 40 percent shortfall, severely affecting kharif crop sowing and reducing overall acreage by 23 percent . This poses a serious challenge for agriculture, especially in rain-fed regions. Days after Meta Layoffs, Zuckerberg says companies should empower workers, not replace them. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg believes AI-driven job losses are exaggerated, advocating for tools that boost individual productivity. This comes as the tech giant laid off 8,000 employees, reassigning another 7,000 to AI projects, while scrapping thousands of open roles. The company is heavily investing in AI infrastructure, aiming for efficiency amidst a competitive landscape. This stance contrasts with other industry leaders' more cautious outlooks on AI's impact on employment. Bengaluru, Chandigarh, Delhi top average income: Report. Bengaluru, Chandigarh, and Delhi lead in average income, while Chandigarh, Thiruvananthapuram, and Vadodara see the highest household spending. The top six cities dominate national consumption, with Delhi NCR alone accounting for a significant portion. A new report highlights the growing middle and high-income segments, projecting a decline in low-income households in major urban centers by 2030.

transcript.title: Bhopal and Madhya Pradesh
transcript.text: Now, news closer to home in Bhopal and across Madhya Pradesh. Diggy's Team Appeals To His Supporters To Stand By Him. Singh is facing opposition in the Congress after his statement, giving a clean chit to the government over the party's allegations about land allotment in Ujjain. Major Breach: Question Papers Allegedly Stolen From RGPV Before Exam. Vice-Chancellor Alok Sharma has issued a show-cause notice to Archana Tiwari, director of the School of Biotechnology and controller of examinations (PG), seeking a written explanation within three days. Twisha Sharma Death Case: Special Investigation Team Formed To Probe Theft At Retired Judge's Residence. Police officials questioned her regarding the valuables and other belongings kept in her room while also informing her about the recovered silver ornaments and documents. Law Student, 13-Year-Old Molested In Separate Incidents. A case has been registered against the accused for forcibly entering the house, molestation and assault. Restaurant owner attacked near DCP office, car vandalised in Bhopal. Triumph Bonneville Speedmaster Price in Bhopal. Civic Chief Inspects Waterlogging Hotspots, Orders Immediate Corrective Measures. Building inspectors, engineering officials and the removal team remained present throughout the demolition process. "Judges Cannot Be Threatened For Their Verdicts": Madhya Pradesh High Court. Madhya Pradesh In troubled lands. News On AIR July 2, 2026 2:30 PM. BJP youth leader booked for 'sexually harassing' doctor inside Madhya Pradesh hospital. Several Anganwadi Centres Await Nutrition Stock In Aalirajpur District. Workers said the disruption has stalled the distribution of nutritional supplements to children and expectant mothers, raising concerns over efforts to tackle malnutrition. Madhya Pradesh Farmer With 10-Foot-8-Inch Dreadlocks Eyes Guinness World Record. Women-led tourism model gets NITI Aayog 'best practice' tag. Video Woman Stripped, Paraded In Madhya Pradesh By In-Laws Over Property Dispute. Diggy plans Ram temple 'accountability' yatra. MP seeks export infra boost from Centre. HC asks state to clarify coloniser licence process.

transcript.title: Business and markets
transcript.text: Moving to business, the economy and the markets. Senco Gold Q1 update: Revenue jumps 60 percent on festive demand; SSSG at 38 percent , 8 new showrooms opened. Senco Gold's June quarter results showed a 60 percent increase in revenue and strong same-store sales. The company opened eight new showrooms and plans 12-15 more, targeting growth through inventory optimization and adapting to market conditions despite prior declines in stock performance. KPIT Tech shares plunge 25 percent in five days to nearly four-year low after weak revenue outlook. Is the worst over?. KPIT Technologies shares dropped 25 percent to rupees 558.65 this week following a weak business outlook, wiping out rupees 5,061 crore in market capitalisation. Brokerages downgraded the stock amid concerns over revenue declines and uncertain recovery, while the stock has already lost 52.35 percent so far in 2026. Gold, silver prices today: Comex gold and silver extend rally as weak US jobs data cools Fed rate hike fears. Gold and silver prices rose on 3 July as easing rate hike fears followed a weak US jobs report. Comex gold futures climbed to $4,208, while silver futures reached $63.50. Employment data indicated a slowdown, lowering rate-hike expectations and negatively impacting the dollar. Pulse of the Street: Realty and healthcare lifts markets, but weak rupee clouds rally. Markets rose nearly 1 percent this week as softer crude oil prices, easing volatility and buying in real estate, healthcare and consumption stocks lifted sentiment. However, weakness in capital goods and power, along with continued pressure on the rupee, showed that the recovery remained selective Sebi introduces auto-pledge framework for unpaid client securities. What does it mean for investors?. Under the new framework, securities purchased outside the Margin Trading Facility that remain unpaid will continue to be credited directly to the client's demat account. Godrej Consumer expects high-teens Q1 revenue growth on strong volumes; margins seen lower. Godrej Consumer Products projects a high-teens revenue growth for Q1 FY27, supported by robust volume increases across all categories. Allcargo Global debuts on NSE, BSE following demerger from Allcargo Logistics. Allcargo Global Limited has listed its shares on the NSE and BSE under the ticker symbol AGL, completing the Allcargo Group's demerger and restructuring. The Group now has four focused entities to drive sustainable growth in logistics and supply chain. Atharva Polyplast IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online on BSE, MUFG Intime. Atharva Polyplast's IPO allotment is expected today, with shares allocated proportionally to retail investors due to high oversubscription. The IPO, valued at rupees 27 crore, attracted 10.74 times bids. Refunds for unsuccessful applicants will begin on July 6, 2025, with listings on July 7. OMCs lost rupees 18.9/L on diesel, rupees 6 on petrol. State-run oil companies faced significant losses in the April-June quarter, losing rupees 18.9 per litre on diesel and rupees 6 on petrol. Aswath Damodaran predicts this for the future of AI: The next Amazon won't be Nvidia or OpenAI. Damodaran believes AI will neither drastically eliminate jobs nor be a fleeting trend. He predicts it will enhance productivity while replacing certain roles. For investors, the lesson is that potential long-term AI winners might not yet be obvious, as seen in past technology revolutions. UDAN flights discontinued on 50 percent of routes. India's ambitious plan to boost regional air travel is struggling, with nearly half of UDAN routes now inactive. Top Gainers and Losers on 3 July: Zensar Tech, HFCL, IndusInd Bank, Muthoot Finance, Lupin among top gainers. The Indian stock market rose on July 3 before retreating as profit-taking emerged. The Nifty 50 closed up 0.40 percent , while the Sensex gained 0.35 percent . Realty led gains, but PSU Banks, Auto, and Metal sectors fell. Technology stocks showed signs of recovery amid easing rate hike concerns. India extends anti-dumping duty on butyl alcohol. India has extended anti-dumping duties on butyl alcohol imports from the US, Malaysia, and South Africa for five more years. Stock market today: Sensex gains 260 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,250; IT, pharma shine. Stock market today: The Sensex ended 262 points, or 0.34 percent , higher at 77,763.91, while the Nifty 50 rose by 95 points, or 0.39 percent , to end at 24,270.85. How Air India delays give Gulf carriers an upper hand. Gulf airlines like Etihad and Saudia are reportedly eyeing earlier aircraft delivery slots, potentially from Air India's deferred orders. Aastha Spintex IPO listing date next week. Here's what GMP signals about share debut. Aastha Spintex IPO was subscribed 3.30 times in total. The public issue was booked 1.27 times in the Retail Individual Investors category, and 6.03 times in the Non-Institutional Investors (NII) segment. The Qualified Institutional Buyers (QIB) category garnered 1.87 times subscription. India aims for $1 trn exports this fiscal year: Goyal. India is targeting a monumental $1 trillion in exports this fiscal year, a significant leap from last year's $863 billion. Why did CG Power, Hitachi Energy, Apar Industries and other capital goods stocks crash up to 10 percent today? Explained. Capital goods firms, including GE Vernova T and D India and Siemens Energy India, faced sharp declines after India's Centre allowed four Chinese manufacturers to join government tenders for power projects, impacting investor sentiment as tensions with China eased and infrastructure demands grew. Ritabrata faction takes over TMC headquarters. The Metropolitan office has served as the party's operational headquarters since 2022, when the TMC shifted there after its original office on the EM Bypass was taken up for reconstruction. Expert view: See compelling opportunities in financials, energy, metals, says Sandeep Neema of PL Asset Management. Sandeep Neema of PL Asset Management uncovers promising investment sectors amidst market volatility. He advises against letting FII flow data dictate portfolio choices, emphasising a selective approach within financials, energy, and industrials to seize growth opportunities in India. UK, Italy, Japan award £4.6 billion jet contract. Britain, Italy, and Japan have awarded a £4.6 billion contract to Edgewing, a joint venture, for the development of the Global Combat Air Programme (GCAP) fighter jet. Market outlook: Monsoon, crude oil prices to earnings - Five key macro triggers for Dalal Street in H2CY26. Market experts expect a more constructive outlook for Indian equities in H2CY26 due to falling crude oil prices and easing inflation. However, concerns about expensive valuations and an uncertain monsoon remain, potentially leading to modest returns despite a favorable macro environment. India to boost defence strength with rupees 52,000 cr nod. Defence Minister Rajnath Singh-led DAC greenlit defense procurements worth rupees 52,000 crore, bolstering the Army, Navy, and Air Force with advanced capabilities. EU proposes 5 major defence projects. The European Commission has put forward five significant cross-border defence initiatives, paving the way for EU funding. Market strategy: How should investors rebalance portfolios for H2CY26? Analysts favour banks, auto, metals, healthcare. Market strategy: Valuations have also become more attractive. The Nifty 50 index is currently trading at a 12-month forward P/E ratio of 18.8x, around a 10 percent discount to its long-period average (LPA) of 21x. Its forward P/B ratio of 2.7x is about 5 percent below the historical average of 2.9x. EPFO's New PF Rules: Faster withdrawals and more. EPFO Rule Changes Explained: The Centre has revamped EPF rules, promising faster claim settlements within three days for withdrawals and 20 days for pension and insurance. Multibagger stock: Indiabulls share price zooms 5 percent to its 52-week high following stock market rally. Indiabulls share price jumped 5 percent to hit its 52-week high of rupees 29.50 on Friday, July 3, outperforming the broader market rally on Dalal Street. The multibagger stock has rallied 230 percent from its 52-week low of rupees 8.93, which it had touched in February 2026.

transcript.title: Money, tax and personal finance
transcript.text: Now to your money — taxes, savings and personal finance. You can now add, update email to Aadhaar for free: Check how, last date and other details. UIDAI is now allowing people to add or update email IDs to their Aadhaar card directly through the mobile application. The service was enabled on 1 July 2026 and will be free to use for six months. ITR filing 2026: Gifts, inheritance and rural agricultural land sale receipts can now be reported separately. The new income tax form initially lacked a section for certain tax exempt receipts. Now, it includes an additional dropdown for 'Receipts not in the nature of income'. Experts decode what this news head means for taxpayers. Landlord entitled to higher rent if tenant overstays even after seeking more time to vacate property in this situation. Delhi High Court ruled that tenants overstaying their lease must pay increased rent as per the agreement, even if they temporarily requested more time to vacate. The court emphasized that continued possession triggers the rent escalation clause automatically. This applies even to unregistered lease deeds, as the obligation matures upon expiry of the initial term. Landlords can pursue legal action for unpaid rent and eviction. Dearness Allowance: Could employees get 3-4 percent DA hike announcement this month? Here's what the numbers indicate. Dearness Allowance: DA is revised twice a year in line with the All-India Consumer Price Index (AICPI) to match the cost of living. Here's a look at the numbers and whether employees could get a 3-4 percent DA hike this month. EPFO upgrades unified member portal: UAN activation, generation through portal discontinued; here's how you can do it now. The EPFO's unified member portal is now live after an upgrade, bringing a new look and significant changes. Key services like UAN activation and direct allotment have moved to the UMANG app, utilizing Aadhaar-based Face Authentication. While UAN retrieval is simplified on the portal, death claim filing remains accessible. This update aims for faster, more secure services for all users. Will your PF corpus shrink due to rupees 1,800 contribution cap? EPF-2026 rules bring employer contribution into focus. The central government has introduced the EPF Scheme, 2026, mandating a fixed monthly contribution of rupees 1,800 each from employees and employers. Here's how the new rules may shrink your final provident fund corpus. 'Winning at money is 80 percent behavior and 20 percent ...' - Wealth wisdom of the day from millionaire who once faced $4 mn bankruptcy. Following his tryst with debt, the man recovered and developed his own theory for financial freedom, in which he stresses on incrementally building savings and paying off debts in a systematic way. Ramsey has also made this into a formalized series of '7 Baby Steps'. He strongly advocates that if one can regulate the person in their mirror (themselves), they would win with money. I-T dept allows charitable trusts to seek fresh approval post deadline, taxpayers to get 80G relief. The deadline to apply for fresh approval expired on 30 September 2025. Following this, all the applications made by charitable trusts were rejected purely on the grounds of delay in seeking approval. With the latest circular, the I How much retirement corpus do you need if you have rupees 1 lakh monthly expenses now? Experts say it depends on these factors. Retirement planning involves personalised strategies for investing according to risk appetite and anticipated lifestyle changes. Factors such as inflation and healthcare costs must be incorporated into the calculation of the necessary retirement corpus. 8th Pay Commission extends key data submission deadline to July 31; here's why it matters. 8th Pay Commission latest news: The 8th Pay Commission has extended the deadline for submitting crucial employee data to July 31, 2026, citing difficulties faced by various government bodies. This vital information, including sanctioned strength, personnel numbers, and attrition metrics, must be uploaded exclusively through the commission's online portal. The commission is also holding stakeholder meetings across India, with upcoming sessions in Bhubaneswar and Kolkata to gather input on pay, pensions, and working conditions. EPFO: Documents and errors , Here are the top reasons your employees' provident fund claims could be rejected, explained. Employees' Provident Fund Organisation: We take a look at the top four reasons an EPF subscriber's claim for their employees' provident fund may be rejected. Check the reasons here, explained. 22k gold rate today: Check 24k, 22k, 20k, 18k gold prices (July 3, 2026) at IBJA, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Tanishq, Joyalukkas and Kalyan Jewellers. 22k gold rate: Gold prices are under scrutiny as buyers track daily fluctuations. Today, July 3, 2026, shoppers planning to purchase gold jewellery should compare rates across leading jewellers like Tanishq, Malabar Gold and Diamonds, Kalyan Jewellers, and Joyalukkas, as prices vary. 4 small-cap schemes delivered over 30 percent in 3 months. Do you own any?. The small-cap mutual fund category returned an average 22.41 percent in the past three months, outperforming the Nifty Smallcap 250 TRI. Four schemes delivered over 30 percent , but only one has a track record that extends beyond five years. 8th Pay Commission salary calculator: How much arrears can entry-level (Level 1) govt employees get at 2.0, 2.15, 2.28, 2.57 fitment factors?​. With the 8th Pay Commission working on to revise salaries of central government employees, many of them have been wondering how much arrears they can receive once the 8th CPC report is implemented. EPF Scheme 2026: Will you get more than 8.25 percent interest on your PF contributions now? Check EPFO update. A new Employees' Provident Funds Scheme, 2026, has replaced the 1952 version under the Code on Social Security, 2020. The EPF interest rate remains at 8.25 percent for the financial year 2025-26. While digital services are formally incorporated, private PF trusts now face a cap on their declared interest rates, not exceeding the central government's rate by more than 2 percent . Paytm Europe granted licence by Luxembourg financial authority for credit, funds transfer, payments , Here's all we know. Paytm Europe has been granted a payment institution licence by the Luxembourg financial supervisory authority CSSF to conduct credit and funds transfers, and payment transactions. Here's all you need to know... ITR filing 2026: Made foreign investments? Follow this checklist to avoid tax scrutiny. The mandatory disclosure of foreign assets and foreign income applies only to individuals who qualify as Resident and Ordinarily Resident (ROR) in India. Cashless health insurance claim rejected? You may still get your claim settled; here's how. Cashless health insurance claims are often rejected due to documentation or procedural issues, not outright denial. Understanding the reasons, like network hospital discrepancies or incomplete paperwork, is crucial. If rejected, policyholders can opt for reimbursement, but prompt follow-up with the insurer and proper documentation are key to resolving issues and ensuring claims are settled. ITR 2026: Who must file tax return even if their income is below rupees 4 lakh?. Many taxpayers mistakenly believe they only need to file an income tax return (ITR) if their income exceeds rupees 4 lakh. However, various situations, such as high-value transactions and foreign assets, require mandatory ITR filing regardless of income level. IRDAI plans insurance commission overhaul to curb mis‐selling with staggered payouts and stricter transparency rules. IRDAI plans to implement staggered commissions, spreading payouts over the policy term to improve transparency, reduce churn and align distributor incentives with customer needs across India's insurance market. rupees 4,764 crore revenue from hydration breaks, rupees 22 crore for a Final ticket: The insane numbers behind FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is set to be the most profitable tournament ever, with a prize pool of $871 million and the winning nation receiving $50 million. Ticket prices and broadcasting rights are significantly higher than in previous tournaments. EPF Scheme 2026: PF above rupees 1,800 now voluntary; what changes for you?. PF contributions above rupees 1,800 a month are no longer mandatory under the new EPF Scheme. The contribution rate, wage ceiling and EPF interest rate remain unchanged. HDFC Bank SmartBuy updates reward rules: Here's how new Brand Voucher reward cap impacts credit card holders. HDFC Bank has introduced a separate monthly cap on accelerated reward points earned through Brand Vouchers (Gyftr/Woohoo) on the SmartBuy platform. 8th Pay Commission: How higher HRA, TPTA, and family units may raise Level 1 employee's salary by 65 percent. 8th Pay Commission salary calculator: Central government employee unions are pushing for significant changes in the 8th Pay Commission, demanding higher family unit counts, increased House Rent Allowance (HRA) and Transport Allowance (TPTA), and the merger of Dearness Allowance (DA) with basic pay. These bodies argue current provisions are insufficient for low-level employees, especially in major cities. EPS-2026 replaces EPS-95: Eligibility, membership rules, and withdrawal conditions explained. The central government has notified EPS-2026, replacing previous versions. Effective from June 29, 2026, it clarifies eligibility, membership conditions, and pension benefits, while keeping the minimum monthly pension at rupees 1,000 unchanged. How traders are choosing FTMO alternatives that match their trading style. Traders are increasingly exploring FTMO alternatives as prop trading firms proliferate. These firms offer diverse evaluation systems, trading rules, and payout structures, catering to individual risk appetites and trading styles. Understanding how these models align with your strategy, rather than just brand recognition, is crucial for success in the funded trading space. 5 hidden credit card fees that can quietly increase your borrowing costs. Hidden credit card charges can quietly increase your borrowing costs and reduce your savings. Understanding key fees, payment terms and reward costs helps you manage your credit card wisely and avoid unnecessary expenses while making smarter financial decisions.

transcript.title: Science and technology
transcript.text: Next, science and technology. WhatsApp usernames: Will they make India's digital conversations safer or less trustworthy? Experts weigh in. As digital platforms evolve in India, the way people identify themselves online is clearly changing too. WhatsApp's move towards usernames is more than a feature update. WhatsApp username row: Zoho's Arattai to disable username feature. Zoho's Arattai will remove its username-based account feature after the regulatory challenges faced by WhatsApp. Meta spent billions on AI, but Zuckerberg says progress has been slower than expected: Report. Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged the shortcomings of the company's recent restructuring and the slow development of AI agents. WhatsApp issues username FAQs amid govt scrutiny, Can someone find you with it? Could you be impersonated? Check details. Meta Platforms' messaging app WhatsApp has released detailed set of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for users on its new username feature following controversy over safety and security of the rollout. Oppo Reno 16, Reno 16c launched in India: Check price, specs and more. Oppo launched the Reno 16 series featuring Snapdragon processors and AMOLED displays. Prices in India start at rupees 46,999 for the Reno 16c and rupees 61,999 for the Reno 16 Meta plans to rent AI computing power as it takes on AWS, Google Cloud: Report. Meta is developing a cloud infrastructure to sell AI computing access, competing with AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. WhatsApp usernames could open the platform to impersonations and scams, warn cybersecurity experts: Here is how. Meta's WhatsApp is launching usernames for privacy, enabling users to interact without disclosing phone numbers. While this can protect user identity, experts warn of risks like impersonation and scams, highlighting the necessity for robust anti-abuse measures to ensure safety amid these changes. Key details about iPhone 18 Pro leak online after hackers gain access to 630 GB data from Tata Electronics. Leaks from Tata Electronics reveal details about Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro, including component suppliers and internal documents after a ransomware attack. This breach, involving over 200,000 files, threatens Apple's supplier relationships and business strategy ahead of the September launch. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G debuts in India with 120Hz AMOLED display, price starts at rupees 28,999. Samsung Galaxy A27 5G features a 6.7-inch Full HD+ Super AMOLED display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 50MP triple rear camera, and 5,000mAh battery. OnePlus N6 5G launched in India with 8,000mAh battery, Dimensity 6360 Apex processor: Check price and specs. The OnePlus N6 features a 6.75-inch HD display, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex processor, 8,000mAh battery, and military-grade durability. WhatsApp to let users reserve usernames from next week: Here's how it works. WhatsApp introduces a username system to eliminate the need to share your phone number. The company will allow users to select their usernames starting next week. WhatsApp to let users chat without sharing phone numbers: Username feature coming soon. WhatsApp, which says it has more than 3 billion users globally, has until now allowed users to be contacted by anyone who has their phone number. Will iPhone 17 Pro Max cost nearly rupees 2 lakh in India? Leak suggests so. The iPhone 17 Pro, currently priced at rupees 1,34,900, could reportedly retail between rupees 1,54,900 and rupees 1,69,900. The iPhone 17 Pro Max may be priced between rupees 1,84,900 and rupees 1,99,900, compared with its current price of rupees 1,49,900. Samsung Galaxy M47 5G launched in India with 6,000mAh battery, 50MP OIS camera. Samsung has launched the Galaxy M47 5G in India with a price of rupees 22,999. The phone features a Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 chipset, 6.7-inch AMOLED display, 6,000mAh battery, and a 50MP camera. Apple prepares smart glasses to take on Meta, launch tipped for next year. Apple is eyeing the smart glasses market, potentially releasing its first model next year. Apple could be looking to leverage its strong ecosystem to bring in buyers, a report claims iPhone 18 Pro launch date, expected price, processor and camera upgrades. Leaks suggest Apple's iPhone 18 Pro lineup may launch on September 8 or 9. The phone is expected to see a price of around $1,200-$1,300 iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max could see up to $200 price hike, says report. Apple could raise the prices for the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro models by up to $200. The iPhone 18 Pro could be priced at $1,200-$1,300, if the new report is to be believed Mint Explainer: Why quantum computing is the next geopolitical race. With multi-billion dollar investments and new US executive orders targeting a 2028 breakthrough, global powers are rushing to secure hardware superiority before 'Q-Day' upends modern encryption. Flipkart GOAT Sale: iPhone 17 gets rupees 12,000 discount, Pro models cheaper by up to rupees 22,000. Flipkart's GOAT Sale is beginning from July 4 with discounts on various products including the iPhone 17 series. The iPhone 17 will be priced at rupees 70,900, the iPhone 17 Pro at rupees 1,12,900, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max at rupees 1,27,900 Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models: Report. Google has limited Meta's access to its Gemini AI models due to high demand. This has disrupted Meta's internal AI projects and affected other Google clients. Despite growing Google Cloud revenue, computing power constraints hindered further growth in the sector. Fake GTA 6 early access websites are stealing gamers' money: Here's how the scam works. Cybersecurity researchers warn that scammers are exploiting GTA 6 hype by offering fake early access for cryptocurrency payments. Soaring iPad, Xbox prices reveal pain of memory chip mess. Apple and Microsoft increased prices for Xbox consoles, Macs, and iPads due to a memory chip shortage driven by AI demand. Moto Pad 70 Pro launched in India with 13-inch 3.5K display, AI features and 10,200mAh battery. The Moto Pad 70 Pro features a 13-inch 3.5K display, Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, and quad speaker setup. It supports 2TB expandable storage and runs on Android 16 OpenAI names Prabhjeet Singh India MD, launches GPT-5.6 Sol with stronger cyber protections. OpenAI has appointed Prabhjeet Singh as Managing Director for India. The company has also announced a limited release of its GPT-5.6 model, which features three variants: Sol, Terra, and Tuna iPhone 18 to get a big RAM upgrade as Apple doubles down on AI: Report. Apple is set to launch the iPhone 18 and iPhone 18e next spring with 9GB and the A20 chipset. The iPhone 18 lineup could also include improved AI features and brighter display, and better optics. India's robotics funding doubles in 2026 first-half, but scale seems far away. India's robotics sector continues to lag its global peers. In 2025, Indian robotics startups raised less than 1 percent of the capital secured by US robotics startups and about 2 percent of that raised in China, according to Tracxn.

transcript.title: Development and policy
transcript.text: Now to development, infrastructure and government policy. After China Pledges to Support Teesta Project, India Will 'Factor All Developments' Into Its Approach. India's long game: From influence to authority. MAHSR project: India's first bullet train corridor nears completion. 16th India-Japan Annual Summit Joint Statement. India's High-Speed Rail Future:Building a Standardised Path for Expansion. Funeral diplomacy: India's actions raise questions on its West Asia policy. Eye on Dhaka-Beijing cooperation, India conveys its position on Teesta to Bangladesh. India Knows How to Build Infrastructure, But It Still Can't Reliably Track What's Happening To It. India seeks to quell public backlash on ethanol-mixed fuel after 'experiment' remark. Policy Roundup: District GDP, gender bias in AI, weak rupee. India Signals AI Policy Shift: Time is right for dedicated law, says MeitY.

transcript.title: Across India
transcript.text: Turning to the big national stories. Sonowal unveils first Made in India EXIM shipping container, Maersk orders 1,000 of them. India has launched its first domestically manufactured EXIM grade shipping container, a significant step towards reducing reliance on foreign suppliers. Global shipping giant Maersk has ordered 1,000 of these containers, produced in Uttar Pradesh. This achievement underscores India's growing manufacturing prowess and commitment to building robust maritime infrastructure, supported by government initiatives like the rupees 10,000 crore Container Manufacturing Promotion Scheme. 'Tejo Mahalaya' dispute reaches Allahabad high court; hearing on July 6. NEW DELHI: A writ petition was filed before the Allahabad High Court on Friday seeking a declaration that the Agreshwar Mahadev Nagnatheswar Virajman Tejo Mahalaya temple exists within the Taj Mahal complex. 'Will never win genuine recognition': China on India-Japan 'free and open Indo-Pacific' stand. On Friday, Chinese spokesperson in India, Yu Jing, highlighted the statement in this regard made by the spokesperson of Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Guo Jiakun, a day earlier, when talks between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and PM Takaichi were held. Four Chinese firms with factories in India cleared to bid for power projects. The four firms , TBEA Energy, Nanjing Electric India, New Northeast Electric India and Taikai Electric (India) , have been exempted from the provisions of the public procurement rules. Former VP Jagdeep Dhankhar undergoes successful angioplasty, gets two stents. Hospital sources said that Dhankhar had "complaints of heaviness in chest while walking, shortness of breath, and intermittent chest pain over the past few days" and visited Eternal Hospital for a comprehensive cardiac evaluation. PM Modi on six-day tour of Indonesia, Australia, New Zealand from July 6. While an estimated 1.4 lakh people of Indian origin and non-resident Indians are in Indonesia, the number for Australia goes up to 9.7 lakh, and about 3 lakh in New Zealand. Amrit Bharat Station Scheme: Redevelopment of Rajasthan's 151-year-old Gandhinagar Jaipur railway station nears completion. Redevelopment of the 151-year-old Gandhinagar Jaipur railway station under the Amrit Bharat Station Scheme is nearing completion. 'Strong' El Nino during June-Sept, below-normal rain over Indian subcontinent : WMO. El Nino years in the past have seen extreme events The Daily Catch-Up How India's temples safeguard devotees' offerings, and other top news. Ayodhya's donation system comes under the microscope, the Navy foils a piracy attempt in the Gulf of Aden, and Ronaldo makes World Cup history and other news from the day Matcha tea, now from India: Assam estate sells first India-made batch. 5-kg batch produced at Chota Tingrai Tea Estate in Tinsukia district sold for rupees 3,000 at Guwahati Tea Auction Centre Khatu Shyam rail project: Sundarpura station construction to begin next year; 9 new stations planned to boost connectivity. Railway station near Khatu Shyam Ji temple: Last month, Railway Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw announced the construction of the new railway station during his visit to the state. 6 years on, new Indore hospital exists only on paper, but hiring in full swing. Government approved 100-bed hospital in 2020 for Khajrana area, which has population of over 3 lakh and no secondary-care centre. Defence acquisition proposals worth rupees 52,000 cr cleared, will boost combat readiness of forces. DAC nod to acquisition of 'Akash Tarang', MRSAM systems, VSHORADS, jet-based Kamikaze drones among others. Month after Assam 'stalker' attack kills cousin, teen girl dies in ICU. Within 24 hours of May 31 attack that rocked state, accused was killed in police encounter

transcript.title: Around the world
transcript.text: And finally, here is what is happening around the world. Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February. Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events. German row over plan for workers to need sick note on first day of illness. A doctors' group says it "borders on madness" that patients will have to obtain the note in person. Stand-up comic held for jokes about Erdoğan and Islam in Turkey crackdown. Deniz Göktaş is regarded as one of Turkey's most popular comedians and is accused of "inciting hatred and hostility" on stage.

transcript.title: Sign-off
transcript.text: That is your briefing. Stay sharp, and have a strong day.
